title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO EBUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO BARRIO SAN VICENTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 503 / 65 OG No. 2, 254 (January 13, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4758, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO EBUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO BARRIO SAN VICENTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Ebus in the Municipality of Guagua, Province of Pampanga, is changed to Barrio San Vicente.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
